reviews.author: Stephanie K.
reviews.text: Sofía herself is amazing — my brake job was perfect and fair priced. Took off a star because I had to DM Instagram three times to get an appointment, then they didn't have me in the system when I showed up. Scheduling situation is rough.

reviews.author: Bianca R.
reviews.text: Sofía understands cars like no one else. I've been to 5 shops in SF and this is the first time I left without feeling like I got ripped off. Bringing my sister's car next.

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Got my transmission diagnostic done last week. Sofía took two hours and checked everything until she found the real issue. Saved me $800 over the dealer quote. Worth every penny.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Hidden gem. Booking is hard because they don't have an online system but once you're in — magic. Sofía remembered my car's history from a year ago.

reviews.author: Devon K.
reviews.text: DM'd Instagram 4 times over two weeks, never got a reply. Showed up in person — fully booked through June. If you can't take new customers say so.

reviews.author: Maritza H.
reviews.text: Mi taller favorito en la Mission. Sofía es una artista con los carros. Le arregló la transmisión a mi esposo y quedó perfecto. ¡Vayan!

reviews.author: Ashley R.
reviews.text: Great brake job and oil change. Wish they had online booking — I almost gave up before getting an appointment.

reviews.author: @davidk_sf
reviews.text: is anyone awake?? my subaru is shifting really weird, almost stalled at a light

reviews.author: @henry.cuevas
reviews.text: Just picked up my Civic from Reyes Auto Repair and I'm literally SO relieved. Sofia fixed my brakes perfectly and it was $200 less than the dealer quoted. This woman is a genius 🔧🙌

reviews.author: @andrea.morales
reviews.text: First time here thanks to my friend Maritza. Oil change + tire rotation for my Lexus was fast and fair. Sofia and her team are the real deal ✨💪

ai_competitor_simulation.name: PitPilot Auto AI
ai_competitor_simulation.tagline: Same tools. Same neighborhood. Always replies in 4 minutes.
